ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "film_title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "released_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the film */,
  "worldwide_gross" TEXT /* Total worldwide box office gross in dollars */,
  "domestic_gross" TEXT /* Total domestic (USA) box office gross in dollars */,
  "foreign_gross" TEXT /* Total foreign box office gross in dollars */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Production budget in dollars */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the film */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer of the film */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the studio */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the studio */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the studio */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue in dollars */,
  "expenses" TEXT /* Total expenses in dollars */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Net profit in dollars */,
  "marketing_expenses" TEXT /* Marketing expenses for the film */,
  "production_expenses" TEXT /* Production expenses for the film */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the film's distributor */,
  "profit_margin" TEXT /* Profit margin of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the campaign is associated with */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign in dollars */,
  "media_channels" TEXT /* Media channels used in the campaign (e.g., TV, Online, Print) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_performance" TEXT /* Summary of the campaign's performance */,
  "social_media_impact" TEXT /* Impact of social media on the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the record is associated with */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the box office record */,
  "domestic_sales" TEXT /* Domestic sales in dollars */,
  "foreign_sales" TEXT /* Foreign sales in dollars */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales in dollars */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the film was playing in on the record date */,
  "average_ticket_price" TEXT /* Average ticket price on the record date */,
  "weekend_gross" TEXT /* Weekend gross sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_records_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., executive, analyst, production manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
